Re: Inquiry about IAM integration with custom API roles,"Dear Isabella,
Thank you for your interest in Aetheros! We'd be happy to provide more information about our IAM service and how it can be used to manage access to your custom APIs.

You can achieve granular role-based access control (RBAC) with Aetheros by defining roles that permit access to specific API endpoints or methods. You can specify these permissions down to the HTTP method level (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.).

Aetheros also allows you to leverage user attributes and other contextual information when defining access control policies. This enables you to create dynamic rules that adapt to different situations.

Regarding role inheritance and conflicts, Aetheros uses a least privilege model. This means that users are only granted the permissions explicitly assigned to their roles. Inheritance is handled hierarchically, and any conflicts are resolved in favor of the most restrictive permission.
We are confident that Aetheros can provide the flexible and robust IAM solution you need. Please let us know if you have any further questions or would like to schedule a demo.
The Aetheros Support Team",0,0,1,"Legitimate email from a known company, proper formatting, and no suspicious links or attachments.","{
""reason"": ""Legitimate email from a known company, proper formatting, and no suspicious links or attachments."",

INVITATION TO THE 79TH IFALPA ANNUAL CONFERENCE,"Dear Andrew, On behalf of the IFALPA local organizing committee and its sponsors, we would like to officially invite you to participate in the 2025 Annual Conference, a key event for IFALPA member associations worldwide. This gathering provides a dedicated platform to strengthen collaboration and unity among pilots, fostering a collective approach to address the challenges facing the global aviation community. This landmark event will be held in Incheon, Republic of Korea from 3rd to 6th of April, 2025.. Special benefits from the local organizing executive committee and its sponsors: The executives committee and its sponsors have negotiated discount rates with major airline operators and hotel management, and they have accepted a 30% discount from our delegates if we are to make group bookings and hotel reservations for them. This is a first come, first-served basis. They sell out fast so book now.. This is first of its kind to support and assist our intended delegates with their trip. Important Information For those who require a visa to South Korea: Due to the new resolutions and recent decisions of the councilors in the immigration department regarding tourist visas to South Korea, due to global issues on terrorism and criminal tendencies of immigrants as this mostly affected those that are coming to South Korea on a tourist visa. This is entirely a new arrangement different from the old system just to check these global vices and also to discourage those without a genuine reason/intention from entering into South Korea. The local organizing executive committee therefore decided to assist the participants with their visa processing for those who require a visa to South Korea. The visa processing is free (no payment is required) and the processing time is 10 working days. We will process your visa here, and then email you a backup documents, and give you a lay-down on who to meet in our Embassy or Consulate in your home country with the command of the South Korean Immigration Bureau to stamp your visa with the document you will receive which will allows you to stay for a maximum of 60 days, it is important that we let you know the process. Delegates who wish to benefit from the 30% discount for the flight booking/hotel reservation and those who need assistance with their visa should email us immediately for further information and guidelines on how to benefit from this gesture. The 79th IFALPA Conference provides a valuable opportunity to stay informed, connect with peers, and contribute to discussions that shape the profession. We look forward to your participation! Warm regards, Capt. Amornvaj (Ben) Mansumitchai President- IFALPA",1,0,2,Legitimate email from a well-known organization (IFALPA) with a clear purpose and no suspicious links or attachments.,"{
